summary: Validated all 4 frontend tasks for Freccos at viewport 390x844 as Priya. All 8 verification points PASS. (1) Login screen has NO Google button, NO 'or' divider, NO Google icon — only Email, Password, Forgot, Sign-in, and Create-account; data-testid='login-google' does NOT exist. (2) Login flow with priya@freccos.com / Demo1234! succeeds and lands on /explore. (3) Signup step 2 (after Skip on step 1) renders the data-testid='signup-legal' paragraph with exact text 'By signing up you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.' below the Create-account button, with both terms and privacy links present; clicking terms navigates to /terms. (4) /terms and /privacy render correct headers + 'Coming soon, please check back shortly.' body and are reachable WITHOUT login (cookies/storage cleared — both pages load with the expected data-testid). (5) Settings bottom sheet shows logout (657px) → legal links (723.5px, both Privacy policy and Terms of service separated by middle dot) → delete (765.5px) ordering correct; tapping Privacy navigates to /privacy AND closes the sheet (settings-logout no longer in DOM). (6) People tab Follow button is fully within the 390px viewport in every available filter tab (All: 1 user not clipped, Friends-of-friends: 0 users — empty state, New/recently_joined: 1 user not clipped). Layout by inspection in People.jsx (flex 1 1 auto + minWidth:0 on middle, flex 0 0 auto + whiteSpace:nowrap on button) is correct and matches request. (7) Feed sheet animation verified by computed style on the first frame after tapping a feed-new-rec card: panel `.sheet-panel` has animationName=sheetUp, duration=0.32s, timing=cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.9, 0.3, 1.2); backdrop has animationName=fadeIn, duration=0.2s — matches /app/frontend/src/components/BottomSheet.jsx spec. (8) Backend login was already confirmed working via UI login (test 2). The standalone curl-style sanity from urllib returned 403 (likely Cloudflare bot protection on unauth UA), but the auth login from the browser via the React app returns 200 and lands the user on /explore, so endpoint is healthy from the production frontend path.
action_items: No action items — all 4 reported tasks verified end-to-end via UI.
critical_code_review_comments: BottomSheet.jsx: the conditional 'if offset===0 && !isDragging then strip inline transform/animation:none' is the correct fix to let the CSS sheetUp keyframe play on open. Verified live: animationName=sheetUp, duration=0.32s, cubic-bezier(0.2,0.9,0.3,1.2) on the first frame.

LegalPage.jsx Back link is hardcoded to /login. If a user lands on /terms from Settings (i.e., they ARE logged in), Back will bounce them to /login (and ProtectedRoute would then redirect them again to /). Consider using navigate(-1) or checking auth state to route back appropriately. Minor UX nit, not blocking.

People.jsx PersonRow layout uses flex with avatar+text as a Link (flex:1 1 auto, minWidth:0) and the Follow button (flex:0 0 auto, whiteSpace:nowrap). This correctly prevents button clipping regardless of name/preview length. Confirmed visually + via bounding-box check at 390px.

MyProfile.jsx settings-legal links call both navigate (via react-router <Link to>) and onClick={onClose} — verified: tapping Privacy in the open sheet closes the bottom-sheet (settings-logout disappears from DOM) AND lands on /privacy.
Signup.jsx legal paragraph text matches request verbatim. Both links use react-router <Link>, so SPA navigation is preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Important selectors confirmed in this run: people-tab-all / people-tab-friends_of_friends / people-tab-recently_joined are the filter tabs (NOT people-filter-*). Settings gear icon on /me is data-testid='settings-btn' (NOT 'profile-settings'). The bottom-sheet panel is the element with data-testid='place-sheet' itself (className='sheet-panel'); the backdrop is data-testid='place-sheet-backdrop'. For animation verification: on the first frame after the sheet opens, computed animationName on the panel must include 'sheetUp' and on the backdrop must include 'fadeIn'. Once dragging begins or the sheet is in closed state, animation switches to 'none' and transform is applied inline — that's intentional per BottomSheet.jsx. People 'New' tab currently has only 1 seeded user; if regression-testing overflow, either inject longer names via DevTools or trust the flexbox spec.
rca of the issue: No bugs found — all 4 tasks delivered as specified.
